untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic holding period selection (6 vs 24 months) based on momentum strength, volume percentile ranking (55th/60th), and comparison of current volume to 20-period SMA with explicit 25% multiplier. The ALLOWED INDICATORS list contains vol_ratio_20 but no percentile ranking function or dynamic holding period logic. Cannot express: (1) volume percentile calculations, (2) conditional holding period switching logic, (3) median-based momentum thresholds, (4) time-horizon-dependent weighting rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core entry logic (positive momentum + above-average volume with 1.25x multiplier) and exit signal (volume decline). However, the signal's key insight—differential volume weighting across 3-month vs 3+ year horizons—cannot be structurally represented in a single rule. This requires a regime-switching or multi-strategy framework outside the backtest engine's apparent scope. The 55th percentile stop and 60th percentile entry thresholds cannot be expressed without a percentile indicator.
